description: This file defines environment configuration functions and variables for a React Single Page Application (SPA). It reads configuration values from environment variables (following Create React App conventions), parses JSON-encoded feature flags, and provides a function to retrieve normalized environment settings.

methods.name: parseJson
methods.description: Parses a JSON string value, returning a fallback if parsing fails or if the value is falsy.

methods.name: getEnv()
methods.description: Returns a normalized configuration object based on environment variables, including API URLs, feature flags, environment mode, and other settings.
